title: anagallis arvensis var. phoenicea
intro: Anagallis arvensis var. phoenicea, also known as purple pimpernel, is a flowering plant that is a variety of the common pimpernel plant. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Anagallis arvensis var. phoenicea can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, tinctures, or salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in various forms.
